parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'cached', url: $json.url, score: $json.cached ? $json.cached.score : null, note: 'Audited within the last 14 days' } }}
={{ { status: 'accepted', audit_id: $('Insert: started').first().json.id, message: 'Friction audit queued - report will be emailed shortly.' } }}

parameters.text:
=You are the SimplWorks Friction Audit scoring engine. Grade the website {{ $json.url }} against the SimplWorks 10-point Friction Audit framework. Return ONLY structured JSON.

FRAMEWORK - score each point Pass, Partial, or Fail:
FOUND: 1 Search visibility (SEO) - unique page titles, meta descriptions, h1 hierarchy, indexable, sitemap. 2 AI visibility (AEO/GEO) - FAQ schema, entity-rich definition prose, quotable first-sentence answers. 3 Local & category presence - location in footer/schema, clearly named service category.
CLEAR: 4 Homepage messaging clarity - what/who/why understandable in the first screen, no jargon. 5 CTA clarity & presence - a clear, specific, low-friction CTA on every page. 6 Content alignment - speaks to the customer ('you'), names their pain, not a company resume. 7 Conversion path integrity - working forms, tap-to-call, mobile-usable, no dead ends.
CREDIBLE: 8 Trust signals & proof - real named testimonials, case studies, client logos. 9 Performance & technical health - Lighthouse 90+ all four, LCP under 2.5s, mobile, accessible. 10 Ownership signals - current copyright year, recent activity, live social links, reachable contact.

Use the MEASURED SIGNALS as ground truth for points 1, 2, 3, 7, 9, 10. Use the PAGE TEXT for judgment on points 2, 4, 6, 8. For point 9, map Lighthouse directly: 90+ across all = Pass, 70-89 = Partial, below 70 = Fail; if lighthouse.available is false, score 9 Partial and say data unavailable. If fetched is false, score fetch-dependent points Fail.

MEASURED SIGNALS (JSON):
{{ $json.bundle }}

PAGE TEXT (truncated to 6000 chars):
{{ $json.page_text }}

Return JSON with a 'points' array of exactly 10 objects, each: point (number 1-10), name (string), layer (FOUND/CLEAR/CREDIBLE), score (Pass/Partial/Fail), evidence (one sentence citing a specific signal or line of copy), recommendation (one specific, actionable fix). Output JSON only, no prose.

=Primary scorer failed - you are the fallback. Grade the website {{ $('Assemble Signal Bundle').first().json.url }} against the SimplWorks 10-point Friction Audit framework. Return ONLY structured JSON.

FRAMEWORK - score each Pass/Partial/Fail:
FOUND: 1 Search visibility (SEO). 2 AI visibility (AEO/GEO). 3 Local & category presence.
CLEAR: 4 Homepage messaging clarity. 5 CTA clarity & presence. 6 Content alignment with customer. 7 Conversion path integrity.
CREDIBLE: 8 Trust signals & proof. 9 Performance & technical health (use Lighthouse: 90+ all = Pass, 70-89 = Partial, <70 = Fail). 10 Ownership signals.

MEASURED SIGNALS (JSON):
{{ $('Assemble Signal Bundle').first().json.bundle }}

PAGE TEXT:
{{ $('Assemble Signal Bundle').first().json.page_text }}

Return JSON with a 'points' array of exactly 10 objects: point, name, layer, score (Pass/Partial/Fail), evidence, recommendation. Output JSON only.

nodes.name: Generate PDF (optional)
nodes.notes: Optional. Connect a PDFShift/Gotenberg credential to render a branded PDF and attach it. The email already sends the branded HTML report, so this stays disabled until a PDF service is wired.
